hero.title: Your financial life, as a real product — not a spreadsheet.
hero.subtitle: Advanced personal financial planning for net worth, real estate, investments, taxes and long-term scenarios. Built on dashboards, forms and projections.

privacy: Your data stays in your own Google Drive. We never store your financial data on our servers.
demoMode: Demo mode: runs fully offline with an in-memory workbook and sample data. No Google account required.

netWorth.title: Net worth
netWorth.text: Assets, liabilities and cash flow in one place.

realEstate.title: Real estate
realEstate.text: Cap rate, cash-on-cash, DSCR and projections.
